name: Product Grid
description: Responsive grid of product cards with image, title, price, and CTA. Used in e-commerce catalogs, feature showcases, and card galleries.

slots.card-image: Product image in Card.Header with aspect ratio container
slots.card-body: Card.Body with product title (_heading6), description (_caption), price (_heading5)
slots.card-footer: Card.Footer with primary Button CTA and optional secondary action
slots.badge: Optional Badge overlay for sale/new/featured status

command-center.notes: Each Card uses cc-frame-sm. Prices use cc-data with cc-glow. Badge uses cc-label. Grid background gets cc-grid.

auradecantism.notes: Product cards use d-glass. Price highlighted. Add to cart button with aura-glow.

clean.notes: Standard product cards with shadow. Clean image + text layout. No extra decoration.
